name: Ana López
content: Ana López — Senior Systems Engineer. 2019–2023: Senior engineer at Stripe Inc., working on the payments orchestration layer. Strong in Rust and PostgreSQL. Led a team of 4 on a Stripe internal Rust SDK. Earlier: 2016–2019 at Cloudflare on the workers runtime.

name: Ben Carter
content: Ben Carter — Backend engineer. Worked at Stripe (2020–2024) on the risk modelling team. Day-to-day stack: Rust, Python, Kafka. Open-source maintainer of a Rust HTTP library. Prior: GitHub Inc. (2018–2020) on the Actions runner.

name: Chika Adeyemi
content: Chika Adeyemi — Staff engineer. 2021–present: Cloudflare, Inc., edge runtime team. Author of internal Rust tooling. Skills: Rust, k8s, TypeScript. Previously: Stripe, Inc. (2017–2021) on the API gateway.

name: Daniel Kim
content: Daniel Kim — Principal engineer at Datadog (2020–present). Built the trace ingestion pipeline. Stack: Go, Kafka, k8s. Earlier: Google LLC (2015–2020) on Borg. PhD CS Stanford.

name: Elena Rossi
content: Elena Rossi — ML engineer. 2022–present: Anthropic, working on inference infrastructure. PyTorch, the Rust programming language, Python 3. Earlier: OpenAI (2020–2022).

name: Farouk Hassan
content: Farouk Hassan — Senior engineer. 2018–2024 at Stripe, Inc. on the financial reporting team. PostgreSQL, TypeScript, Go. Co-owner of the data-warehouse migration to Snowflake.

name: Gabriella Silva
content: Gabriella Silva — Distributed systems engineer. 2017–present at Cloudflare. Wrote a chunk of the durable-objects subsystem. Rust, K8s, Postgres. Speaks at conferences on the Rust language.

name: Henrik Olsson
content: Henrik Olsson — Backend lead at Klarna (2019–2023). Stack: Java, Kafka, PostgreSQL. Moved to Stripe in 2024 (Stripe Inc.) on the merchant onboarding flow.

name: Imani Johnson
content: Imani Johnson — Staff infra engineer. Datadog Inc. (2021–present): SRE for the metrics pipeline. Go, Kubernetes, Postgres. Hobby project: a tiny Rust tracing library.

name: Junichi Tanaka
content: Junichi Tanaka — Search engineer. 2019–present at GitHub Inc., search relevance team. Elasticsearch, Python, Go. Earlier: Mercari (2015–2019). Strong on retrieval pipelines.

name: Kavita Sharma
content: Kavita Sharma — Platform engineer. 2018–2024 at Stripe, Inc. on internal developer platforms. Rust, k8s, TypeScript. Built the internal Rust monorepo build pipeline.

name: Liam O'Brien
content: Liam O'Brien — Senior backend engineer. 2020–present at Plaid, working on the connections team. Go, Postgres, Kafka. Earlier: GitHub (2017–2020) on Actions reliability.

name: Mei Lin
content: Mei Lin — Tech lead at Anthropic (2023–present). Inference platform. Python 3, Rust, K8s. Earlier: Google (2018–2023) on Vertex AI. Open-source contributor to ray.

name: Niamh Ryan
content: Niamh Ryan — Full-stack engineer. 2019–present at Vercel. TypeScript, React, Postgres. Owner of the Edge Functions billing integration. Open-source: a small TS library for Next.js.

name: Omar Khaled
content: Omar Khaled — Backend engineer. 2021–present at Stripe (Stripe Inc., the payments unit). Rust, PostgreSQL. Migrated a critical ledger from Java to the Rust programming language.

name: Petra Dvořák
content: Petra Dvořák — Site reliability engineer. 2019–2023 at Datadog. K8s, Go, Kafka. Moved to Cloudflare, Inc. in 2023 on the analytics pipeline.

name: Quentin Roux
content: Quentin Roux — Compiler engineer. 2020–present at Meta Platforms, working on the Hack runtime. C++, Rust. Spoke at LLVM dev meeting 2023. Earlier: Mozilla.

name: Rashida Patel
content: Rashida Patel — Backend lead. 2019–2024 at Stripe, Inc. on the financial connections team. Stack: Go, TypeScript, Postgres. Earlier at Affirm. Strong on accounting domain modelling.

name: Sven Eriksson
content: Sven Eriksson — Distributed-systems engineer. 2018–present at Cloudflare. Rust, Kubernetes, Postgres. Built one of the durable-object dispatch paths. Author of two crates on crates.io.

name: Tomás Fernández
content: Tomás Fernández — ML platform engineer. 2022–present at Open AI (the inference team). Python, the Rust programming language, k8s. Earlier: Snowflake (2019–2022).

name: Uma Krishnan

name: Valeria Mendoza
content: Valeria Mendoza — Backend engineer. 2020–present at Linear, the issue tracker. TypeScript, Postgres, GraphQL. Earlier: Stripe, Inc. (2018–2020) on Atlas.

name: Wei Zhang

name: Ximena Ortiz

name: Yusuf Ahmed

name: Zara Okonkwo
